_note: JSON sidecar for migration-manifest.yaml. The wizard runtime CLI consumes JSON; YAML is the human-facing companion. Both files MUST stay in sync.

.claude/receipt_gate.sh.benefit: Fixes a safety-check bug that was stopping you to approve ordinary edits to your own notes and documents (everyday words like "firm" or "High" were being mistaken for risky commands). The check now decides by what an action actually does, so it pauses only for genuinely risky or irreversible actions — and no longer trains you to click through every prompt.

operating_discipline.md.benefit: Adds a short plain-language explanation of why auto mode still pauses before sending, sharing, or deleting something — that pause is intentional and cannot be switched off.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.3 -> v0.6.4 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). The corrected safety-check script is delivered and the operating-discipline guidance gains a short explanatory note; your edits to operating-layer files are kept or saved for review.
migrations.notes: Operating-layer content fix from v0.6.3: the pre-write receipt gate (.claude/receipt_gate.sh) no longer classifies actions by scanning the text content of local edits with over-broad word matching (which falsely stopped ordinary markdown edits and trained rubber-stamping); it now classifies by the action's shape (tool + command word). operating_discipline.md gains a short 'Why auto mode still pauses for some actions' subsection. No new managed files, no new capabilities; foundation docs and schema byte-identical to v0.6.3.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.3.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.4/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.3.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.2 -> v0.6.4 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). The v0.6.3 operating-layer fixes PLUS the corrected safety-check script are delivered; your edits are kept or saved for review.
migrations.notes: Combined jump from v0.6.2 straight to v0.6.4 (an operator on v0.6.2 who never took v0.6.3). Delivers the v0.6.3 operating-layer content fixes (combined operator-reach apply command, approved-update-contract deny, shared update-notice source) PLUS the v0.6.4 receipt-gate classification fix and the auto-mode explanatory note. All operating-layer content changes to existing files; no new sections or capabilities; foundation docs byte-identical to v0.6.2.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.2.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.4/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.2.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.1 -> v0.6.4 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). The next-phase skill fix and the v0.6.3 + v0.6.4 operating-layer fixes are delivered; your edits are kept or saved for review.
migrations.notes: Combined jump from v0.6.1 straight to v0.6.4. Delivers the v0.6.2 next-phase approval-drill content fix, the v0.6.3 operating-layer content fixes, and the v0.6.4 receipt-gate classification fix plus the auto-mode explanatory note. All operating-layer content changes to existing files; no new sections or capabilities; foundation docs byte-identical to v0.6.1.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.1.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.4/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.1.

migrations.migration_steps: 1. Run the upgrade check (plan-only) to confirm v0.6.0 -> v0.6.4 is offered. 2. Run the apply path (operator-explicit). Operating-layer files changed across v0.6.1 through v0.6.4 are merged (your edits kept) or saved for review; the health-check skill is delivered additively.
migrations.notes: Combined jump from v0.6.0 straight to v0.6.4 (an operator still on v0.6.0). Delivers the v0.6.0 -> v0.6.1 operating-layer additions (an additive section in operating_discipline.md, the pause-skill change, and the health-check skill), the v0.6.2 next-phase fix, the v0.6.3 operating-layer content fixes, and the v0.6.4 receipt-gate classification fix plus auto-mode note. Classified minor-additive because the combined delta includes v0.6.1's additive capabilities. Foundation docs byte-identical to v0.6.0.
migrations.preflight: Verify the operator project carries a .wizard/replay-capsule.json and a .wizard/manifest.json whose foundation_bundle_version is v0.6.0.
migrations.rollback: Restore from .wizard/backups/pre-v0.6.4/ and set foundation_bundle_version back to v0.6.0.
